Random Student Number Generator 
 Created by nanocode38 using Python PySide6, This software has poor synchronization performance, and long-term use may cause errors in the UI interface. Just restart it

Help Text:
Random Student Number Generator, 
 Write a comma-separated list of names sorted by student number as a csv file and copy it to the Classes directory, then start the program and select the class, finally click the button to draw student numbers
